MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted by the Court -- Defendant DEBORAH BURKMAN's Demurrer to Amended Complaint: Demurrer to 3rd cause of action for breach of contract re: non-tender of rent for 14 months in 2000 and 2001 is overruled.
